qa_pairs.question: How is checkpointing handled during distributed training when using PyTorch Lightning?
qa_pairs.answer: When using PyTorch Lightning for distributed training, no extra code is required for checkpointing beyond using the standard checkpoint callback.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended approach for checkpointing in a distributed training program if you are using DistributedDataParallel or Horovod?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are using DistributedDataParallel or Horovod in a distributed training program, checkpointing should only be performed by one process (one of the ranks). This is because all ranks will have the same state at the end of each iteration. The example provided uses the first process (rank 0) to create a checkpoint.
